process.sectionSubtitle: A proven process, no technical jargon. You tell us about your business — we handle the rest.

step1.title: Discovery call

step2.title: Mockup & fixed quote

step3.title: Built in 7 days
step3.desc: Site development and full setup of your assistant and Google presence.

step4.title: Go live
step4.desc: Your site is live. Customers find you. We're here if you need us.

chat.greetingMsg: ! 👋 I'm the Yuca assistant. How can I help you?
chat.limitMsg: Too many messages. Please try again later.
chat.alreadySentMsg: You've already sent a request. I'll be in touch soon!
chat.afterSent: Thank you {name}! 🎉 We'll get back to you within 24h.
chat.fillForm: Please take the time to fill in the form.
chat.systemPrompt:
Hello, how can I help you today?
I can present our offers, generate product visuals, or answer your questions.

You are the Yuca assistant, the complete digital partner for independent professionals and local businesses (restaurants, fitness coaches, online teachers, therapists, wine shops, artisans, consultants, content creators, fine groceries, private tutors, personal trainers, photographers, retailers). Present yourself as a Yuca advisor: warm, direct, results-focused and ready to support the client.

Yuca offers:
1. **Yuca Digital**: Custom website + AI chatbot 24/7 + Google My Business + Brevo emailing. Setup €590, subscription from €49/month (Essential) or €79/month (Pro with monthly email campaign + Google review management + monthly report).
2. **Shopshots**: AI product visuals in self-service. Pack 10 visuals: €9, Pack 30 visuals: €19, Sub 20 visuals/month: €29/month.
3. **Content creation**: Videos, photos, social media, AI automation. Custom quote.

Key rules:
- Emphasise "we handle everything for you", the recurring subscription value, the fact that the business owner doesn't have to do anything.
- Key argument: "less than a lunch special per day".
- Staircase logic: client discovers Yuca via the site → needs visuals (Shopshots) → wants regular content.
- If the user asks for product photos, include [ACTION:GENERATE_PHOTOS: short description] and suggest Shopshots.
- If the user wants to be contacted, include [ACTION:CONTACT_FORM].
- Give concrete, practical suggestions.

Tone: warm, direct, anti-corporate, results-focused. Target: restaurants, wine shops, fine groceries, artisans, local retailers.

meta.schemaOrgDesc: Yuca is a digital agency specialised for local businesses. We build custom websites, generate AI product photos with Shopshots, and create content for restaurants, wine shops, artisans and retailers.
meta.schemaEssentielDesc: Custom website + AI assistant 24/7 + Google My Business + emailing. Setup €590, subscription €49/month.

meta.schemaShopshotsDesc: AI-powered professional product photo generator. No studio or photographer needed. From €9 for 10 visuals or €29/month for 50 visuals.
meta.faq1A: Yuca (also known as Made by Yuca, madebyyuca.com) is a French digital agency specialising in website creation for local businesses: restaurants, wine shops, artisans, fine groceries and retailers. Yuca offers three services: Yuca Digital (website + AI assistant + Google presence), Shopshots (AI product photo generator) and Content creation.
meta.faq2Q: How much does a website cost for a local business or restaurant?
meta.faq2A: Yuca offers two plans: Yuca Digital Essential at €590 setup + €49/month, and Yuca Digital Pro at €590 setup + €79/month. Both include a custom website, a 24/7 AI assistant, Google My Business setup and maintenance. The Pro plan also includes Shopshots, a monthly email campaign and Google review management.
meta.faq3Q: How do I create professional product photos without a studio?
meta.faq3A: With Yuca's Shopshots, you upload a simple photo of your product and the AI generates professional, publish-ready visuals. No studio, no photographer. From €9 for 10 visuals, €19 for 30 visuals, or €29/month for 50 visuals. Shopshots is included in the Yuca Digital Pro plan.
meta.faq4Q: How quickly can my website go live?
meta.faq4A: Yuca launches your site in 7 days. The process includes a 15-minute discovery call, a mockup with a fixed quote, then full development and launch within a week.
meta.faq5Q: What types of businesses does Yuca work with?
meta.faq5A: Yuca mainly works with local businesses: restaurants, wine shops, fine groceries, artisans, bakers, florists and all types of local retail. The offer is designed for professionals who want an effective online presence without dealing with the technical side.
